prompt: Create a vertical cinematic fantasy fashion portrait of a young East Asian woman, unnamed floral fairy muse, standing in a dark enchanted garden at night. She has pale porcelain skin, delicate features, soft red lips, and a calm melancholic gaze directed toward the viewer. Her black hair is styled in a loose romantic updo with wispy bangs and tendrils around her face, decorated with tiny blossoms. She wears an elaborate couture gown made from translucent layered petals, gauze, tulle, and organic vine-like filigree, with a fitted bodice and flowing skirt in charcoal black, smoky blue, blush pink, ivory, and deep crimson. Surround her with exactly five major oversized flower forms: one large dark blue translucent bloom behind the upper left, one large ivory-and-pink bloom above her head, one vivid red-pink bloom at the upper right, one pale pink bloom at the lower left, and one smoky grey-blue petal mass flowing from the lower right. Add many fine golden vine tendrils, sparkling pollen-like particles, tiny blossoms, and sheer ribbon-like petals swirling around her body as if suspended in slow motion. Use dramatic chiaroscuro lighting with a soft key light on her face and shoulders, glowing highlights on the translucent petals, and a deep nearly black background with faint bokeh and dust motes. Style should be hyper-detailed, ethereal, elegant, painterly-realistic, high-fashion editorial fantasy photography, shallow depth of field, vertical 2:3 composition, centered subject, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
